upgrades.name: Starting Farmhouse
upgrades.description: The initial farmhouse. One room with a bed. No kitchen.

upgrades.name: Farmhouse Upgrade 1
upgrades.description: Adds a kitchen with a cooking counter and refrigerator, enabling cooking. The bedroom is separated and the bed is upgraded to a double, enabling marriage.

upgrades.name: Farmhouse Upgrade 2
upgrades.description: Adds two new rooms (one empty, one with a crib and child beds) and a larger layout. Unlocks house renovations and house painting from Robin.

upgrades.name: Cellar
upgrades.description: Adds a cellar accessible via the kitchen. Contains casks for aging Cheese and Wine to higher quality.

renovations.name: Remove Crib
renovations.description: Removes the crib from the children's room, preventing any additional children.

renovations.name: Open Bedroom
renovations.description: Opens up the bedroom by removing the wall between it and the main room.

renovations.name: Add Southern Room
renovations.description: Adds a new room to the south side of the farmhouse.

renovations.name: Add Corner Room
renovations.description: Adds a corner room addition to the farmhouse.

renovations.name: Expand Corner Room
renovations.description: Expands the corner room into a larger space.

renovations.name: Add Attic
renovations.description: Adds an attic space above the farmhouse.

renovations.name: Cubby
renovations.description: Adds a small cubby space to the farmhouse.

renovations.name: Dining Room
renovations.description: Adds a formal dining room to the farmhouse.

renovations.name: Open Dining Room
renovations.description: Opens up the dining room by removing the wall between it and the adjacent area.
